desc._value: They are quiet and gentle in nature, so they don't go craving for food too often. They don't seem to be too obedient of their owners.

descD._value: It was a cute little kitty, but with the "Water of Life" all dried up, it turned back into a doll. A little magic can bring it back to life...

desc._value: They are outgoing and active in nature, so they can't sit still for a period of time, which makes them hungry often. They are very obedient of their owners.

descD._value: It was a cute little puppy, but with the "Water of Life" all dried up, it turned back into a doll. A little magic can bring it back to life...

desc._value: They are well-behaved and quiet, so they don't need to be fed more than the usual amount. They are smart and obedient, but also stubborn.

descD._value: It was a cute little bunny, but with the "Water of Life" all dried up, it turned back into a doll. A little magic can bring it back to life...

desc._value: They are very very active, so they get hungry pretty often. Very intelligent, they are quite obedient of their owners.

desc._value: Active, yet calm at times. Can be moderately fed. Very smart in general.

desc._value: Very active and hungry at all times. Need to be fed often. Very friendly in nature, so it's easy to increase the level of closeness with them.

descD._value: It was a cute little black pig, but with the "Water of Life" all dried up, it turned back into a doll. A little magic can bring it back to life...

desc._value: Calm, relaxed, and gentle. A very rare creature.

descD._value: It was a cute little panda, but with the "Water of Life" all dried up, it turned back into a doll. A little magic can bring it back to life...

desc._value: A very adorable male baby dinosaur that is both active and unpredictable.

desc._value: A very adorable female baby dinosaur that is both active and unpredictable.

descD._value: It was a cute little Dino Girl, but with the "Water of Life" all dried up, it turned back into a doll. A little magic can bring it back to life...

desc._value: A snail that is really hard to figure out. The pet's skills will disappear once the magic duration ends.

descD._value: It was a cute little Snail, but the magic has run out, and it turned back into a doll. Unfortunately, there's no way to revive this pet. Double-click on the doll to find out how to find a new pet.
